name: ChatVLSC Staged Configuration Verification
risk_policy: Proceed with changes below risk level 9 when they do not expose credentials, secrets, passwords, tokens, refresh tokens, client secrets, certificates, or recovery codes.

five_passes.name: Inventory
checks: Nested brain-slushie checkout is synced with origin/main.
GitHub connector resolves the repository as The-VLSC/brain-slushie with admin, push, pull, maintain, and triage permissions.
Wrangler dry-run passes.
Wrangler is not logged in interactively; prior local token checks authenticated account lookup only.
Current Cloudflare token candidates are denied for Worker secret and Secrets Store APIs.
No Cloudflare, Graph, OpenAI, or GitHub token was persisted to local environment variables, .dev.vars, GitHub, or Notion.
OpenAI key selection must happen through the secure OpenAI Platform connector before mapping one to OPENAI_API_KEY.
OpenAI Platform API-key target discovery is exposed but rejected by the connected account.
Cloudflare One Client is installed, running, connected, and network healthy.
Cloudflared service is installed and running; tunnel token remains service-config only.
Mixed login and token handoff text is not a clean Microsoft Graph access token.

five_passes.name: Safe-change selection
checks: Only read-only and documentation-facing Worker metadata was selected for implementation.
No credentials, tokens, private keys, refresh tokens, client secrets, or recovery codes are added to source.
No DNS, Access, Entra, OpenAI, or Zapier permission mutation is attempted without an available authorized API path.

five_passes.name: Implementation
checks: Expose GET /configuration/staged.
Expose GET /chatgpt/app/readiness.
Mirror sanitized config to The-VLSC/brain-slushie.
Document Cloudflare Worker secret and Secrets Store import plan without storing secret values in source.

five_passes.name: Verification
checks: Run pnpm run check.
Parse every config JSON file.
Probe live security, identity, staged, and ChatGPT readiness endpoints after deployment.

five_passes.name: Documentation
checks: Update Notion progress log with applied changes and gates.
Keep Entra app-registration write status current.
Keep Cloudflare and OpenAI status explicit rather than inferred.

current_gates.cloudflare_deploy: Prior local Cloudflare token checks authenticated account lookup only; current deploy remains gated on a scoped token or Wrangler login.
current_gates.cloudflare_account_wide_changes: Cloudflare plugin namespace is not exposed in this session; current local API token lacks secret-store permissions.
current_gates.entra_app_registration_write: Microsoft Graph write requires Application.ReadWrite.All or Application Administrator / Cloud Application Administrator rights.
current_gates.microsoft_graph_token: No clean Microsoft Graph access token is available for Graph automation.
current_gates.openai_chatgpt_app_creation: OpenAI Platform connector target discovery was rejected by the connected account.
current_gates.cloudflare_one_client: Cloudflare One Client is connected and healthy; no VPN or security settings were changed.
current_gates.cloudflared_service: Cloudflared service is running; tunnel token stays in service configuration and is not copied into Worker secrets.
current_gates.zapier_entra_execution: Zapier/Entra tools are not exposed in this session.
